name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Cash America Pawn at 3601 N Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75062 is Mon-Fri 9:30 AM – 6:30 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 3.1 stars across 54 reviews. Call +1 972-256-3888.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store operator with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need immediate liquidity or access to affordable merchandise. FirstCash's core business model revolves around buying and selling a wide variety of merchandise while providing non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property.

The company offers several distinct services: pawn loans on items like jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and musical instruments; retail sales of merchandise; gold and precious metal buying; and layaway services with 10% down payments. FirstCash also owns AFF, a subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide. Their pawn loans are non-recourse, meaning borrowers are not personally liable beyond the pledged collateral.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale as the leading international pawn operator and its dual-business model combining traditional pawn with technology-driven payment solutions. The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating institutional legitimacy and scale. Their geographic reach spans 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America including Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador.

As with all pawn shops, this model is best suited for consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable collateral and prefer not to undergo credit checks. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical items, and interest rates and fees on pawn loans can be substantial. Borrowers should understand that failure to repay means permanent loss of the pledged item, though they face no additional debt obligation.

pros: Non-recourse loans—borrowers are not personally liable beyond losing the pledged collateral
No credit check required to obtain a pawn loan
Immediate cash funding with no lengthy application process
Over 3,300 locations across 29 U.S. states plus international presence for convenient access
Wide range of accepted merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and instruments
Gold and precious metal buying services offering spot cash for items most people already own
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment for budget-conscious shoppers
Institutional credibility as S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 component company
cons: Pawn loans charge interest and fees that can accumulate quickly if loan is not repaid promptly
Failure to repay results in permanent loss of pledged item with no recourse for retrieval
Limited to borrowers who own valuable physical collateral suitable for pawn
Interest rates and terms not disclosed on website, requiring store visit for specific pricing
Pawn loans are not suitable for building credit history since they do not report to credit bureaus
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable collateral and want to avoid credit checks
Individuals seeking short-term loans without undergoing traditional lending approval processes
People looking to buy discounted merchandise from pawn inventory
Consumers in areas with limited access to traditional banking or credit options
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers who own valuable collateral and need immediate funding without credit checks or lengthy approval processes. The main caveat is that pawn loans charge interest and fees, and failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item—this model works only for those who can afford to risk losing their collateral or who can reliably repay within the loan term.
